title: Ledger
description: Spec-silent shape (spec sec-4 says only 'ledger.json (cluster hash -> card id)'; decision logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). data/ledger.json is a top-level object keyed by version + entries, where entries maps cluster_hash (sha256 of sorted normalized member URLs, per watcher/clustering.py) to its idempotency record. card_id is null until the Phase 2 analyst publishes a card for that cluster, and stays permanently null for clusters the verifier drops (status 'dropped') -- a later run with new corroborating evidence produces a different cluster_hash, so it is a fresh entry rather than a stuck one. Phase 1 seeds data/ledger.json = {"version": 1, "entries": {}}.

card_id.description: Null until published; permanently null if the cluster was dropped.

first_seen.description: First watch.yml run that produced this cluster_hash.

last_seen.description: Most recent watch.yml run that re-derived this same cluster_hash (idempotency: re-runs bump this, not a new entry).

member_urls.description: Normalized member URLs the cluster_hash was derived from.

verifier_outcome.description: Set only when status is 'dropped': the verifier's reason for permanently dropping this cluster.
